reviews.author: Ramsha Khawaja
reviews.text: Junaid Saab is such a good person. He helped us at 11pm with our circuit board when no one agreed to show up. He is a professional and technically skilled person who is experienced in his field of work. Really really recommend him. ✨️🙌🌷

Junaid is very dedicated , professional and nice person
I will definitely recommend him for any electric job.
